---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you want to propose.

## Use Case / Problem Statement

Describe the problem or use case this feature would solve. Why is this important?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. How should this feature work?

## Alternative Solutions

A description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Examples / Mockups

If applicable, provide screenshots, wireframes, code examples, or mockups that illustrate the feature.

## Acceptance Criteria

Define what "done" looks like for this feature:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Affected Areas

Which parts of the application would be affected?

- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] API/Backend
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Mobile (Android/iOS)
- [ ] Web
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional Context

Add any other context, research, or links that might be helpful:

- Related issues: #...
- Relevant discussions: ...
- External links: ...

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and discussions
- [ ] I have clearly described the problem and solution
- [ ] The title clearly describes the feature
- [ ] I have provided examples or mockups if applicable
